body:
I am opening this PR because the distributed CI does _not_ run on main. It runs on PRs tho so we should see the error popping up here...

I believe something broke the GPU distributed unit tests; see https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/pull/5224#issuecomment-3813583421

Let's fix it here?

cc @briochemc, @simone-silvestri

labels.description: Tests get priority in case of emergency evacuation
labels.name: testing 🧪

labels.description: Our plan for total cluster domination
labels.name: distributed 🕸️

title: Fix Distributed GPU unit tests

body:
Closes #5192 

Adds a friendlier warning when a non-supported symbol is passed for the `timestepper` kwarg to `HydrostaticFreeSurfaceModel`. And expands the docstring a tiny bit.

edit by @navidcy: add the validation + friendlier message to all model constructors
title: Add friendlier error for wrong timestepper in model constructors

body: This PR adds a little explanation and a few examples to the `FieldTimeSeries` docstring.
title: Add more docstrings for `FieldTimeSeries`
